sections.paragraph:
περιδάκρυτος, ον (δακρύω) weeping bitterly π. γενάμενος ὁ Ἰωσήφ GJs 16:1 (v.l. περίδακρυς).—S. deStrycker 301f.—DELG s.v. δάκρυ.

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

deStrycker deStrycker = ÉdeStrycker; s. GJs—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 800
